classifications.phrase: a priority for the Reserve Bank is to support jobs, incomes and businesses
The Board will not increase the cash rate target until progress is being made towards…
it is confident that inflation will be sustainably within the 2–3 per cent target band
A reduction in the cash rate target to 0.25 per cent
will help to lower funding costs across the economy and support the provision of credit

payload.rationale: The statement signals a dovish monetary policy stance focused on supporting employment and economic growth during the coronavirus crisis, with a forward guidance commitment to keep rates low until full employment progress and inflation confidence are achieved.
